response.justification: Nearly two decades of full-stack experience with a strong recent record in the role's core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production at Optilyz and re:cinq — plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which is an explicitly required and rare skill. Demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), Kubernetes/Docker deployment experience, and a customer-facing delivery history make this a solid fit; gaps are mostly in specific framework names (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin) rather than in underlying competencies.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React production experience matching the primary stack
Current AI-agent and MCP development work, a required skill few candidates have
Strong testing and engineering-practice background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test tooling)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin and Python absent from the skills list (Java present but dated)
Significant career time in niche technologies (DLang) less transferable to this stack
